channel.title: FinanceRateCalc — Weekly Mortgage Market Signal
channel.description: Weekly mortgage market intelligence. FRDI score, lender routing signals, and approval timing guidance for brokers and borrowers.

item.title: Weekly Market Signal: FRDI 48 — CAUTIOUS | June 08, 2026
item.description:
This Week's FR Decision Index: 48 — CAUTIOUS

Regime: EASING

Rate declining slightly — proceed with strong profiles. Borderline: submit now if docs are clean.

Based on: 30yr mortgage rate momentum, MBA weekly applications index, OFI (Overlay Friction Index), and lender behavior patterns from 7 years of CFPB HMDA data.

  • Strong profiles (700+ FICO, W2, DTI <43%): Proceed normally
  • Borderline profiles: Check Pre-Flight before submitting
  • Self-employed/SSDI: Monitor market signal weekly

View full market signal →

Run Pre-Flight Check →

Educational tool only. Not financial advice. Based on historical HMDA data.

item.title: Lender Intelligence: Which FHA Lenders Are Most Active in 2024?
item.description:
7 years of CFPB HMDA data reveals dramatic differences in FHA lender behavior:

  • CrossCountry: 5.5% FHA denial rate (2024)
  • Wells Fargo: 58.5% FHA denial rate (2024)
  • UWM: Growing purchase channel dominance
  • PennyMac: Significant improvement trend

Same loan type. Same federal guidelines. Dramatically different outcomes depending on lender selection.

View 7-year lender trends →

Data source: CFPB HMDA Public LAR Dataset 2018-2024. Educational purposes only.

item.title: Pre-Flight Check: Run Your File Before Submitting
item.description:
Most mortgage denials are routing problems, not borrower problems.

The Pre-Flight Check analyzes your file against 7 years of HMDA lender data in 30 seconds:

  • Green: Clear for submission
  • Yellow: Fix these issues first
  • Red: Wrong lender or market timing

No SSN required. No credit pull. PDF boarding pass included.

Run Pre-Flight Check →

Educational tool only. Historical patterns, not predictions.
